case_title: ROBERTS ARTHUR VS HOA HUI BON ERNEST et al

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT HOA HUI BON ERNEST HOA HUI BON LILI
MAILING ON SUBSERVICE NOT DONE 20 DAYS PRIOR HEARING DAY.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT HOA HUI BON ERNEST HOA HUI BON LILI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERTS ARTHUR STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY ROBERTS ARTHUR AS TO DEFENDANT HOA HUI BON ERNEST HOA HUI BON LILI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $4,000.00 FILED BY HOA HUI BON ERNEST HOA HUI BON LILI AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ROBERTS ARTHUR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT HOA HUI BON ERNEST HOA HUI BON LILI STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-05-1991, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUL-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
